title: Journey A Stage 8 — Proposal Generated
description: Proposal document generated and available at URL with scope and pricing

proposal_url.description: Must be valid cloud storage URL (Supabase Storage, Google Cloud Storage, or S3). URL must be accessible

total_value.description: Total contract value in USD (>0 for valid proposal). Must match line items in proposal document

scope.description: Array of scope items (min 2 items). Each item describes a deliverable or service included
